info.name: Attendance Calendar API
info.description: API endpoints for retrieving attendance calendar status for the authenticated user. Supports date range and month-based queries.

request.description: Get attendance calendar for the current authenticated user by month and year. Returns daily status: حاضر, متأخر, غائب, إجازة, عطلة, مطلوب للحضور.

response.name: Success Response

request.description: Get attendance calendar for the current authenticated user by date range. Returns daily status for each day in range.
